query: SET FOREIGN_KEY_CHECKS = 0; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS exchanges; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS transactions; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS orderItems; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS orders; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS customers; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS courses; SET FOREIGN_KEY_CHECKS = 1;
